name: tau-mux
description: A hybrid terminal emulator with structured rendering channels

scripts.start: bun scripts/build-web-client.ts && HT_CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/hyperterm-canvas-dev" electrobun dev
scripts.dev: bun scripts/build-web-client.ts && HT_CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/hyperterm-canvas-dev" electrobun dev --watch
scripts.build:dev: bun scripts/build-web-client.ts --minify && HT_CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/Library/Application Support/hyperterm-canvas-dev" electrobun build --env=dev
scripts.build:stable: HYPERTERM_INCLUDE_TEST_HOOKS=0 bun scripts/build-web-client.ts --minify && HYPERTERM_INCLUDE_TEST_HOOKS=0 electrobun build --env=stable
scripts.package:mac: bun scripts/build-web-client.ts --minify && electrobun build --env=stable && bun scripts/post-package.ts
scripts.report:design: rm -rf .design-artifacts && bun run test:design:web && bun run test:design:native && bun scripts/build-design-report.ts
scripts.report:design:web: rm -rf .design-artifacts && bun run test:design:web && bun scripts/build-design-report.ts
scripts.report:design:gate: rm -rf .design-artifacts && bun run test:design:web && bun run test:design:native && bun scripts/build-design-report.ts --gate
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:full-suite: bun run typecheck && bun run test && rm -rf .design-artifacts && bun run test:e2e && bun run test:native && bun scripts/build-design-report.ts --gate && bun run test:design:audit
